name: EG-CONTRA-001 fail — strictest-wins when EgyptMoH says contraindicated and WHO-DAK disagrees
description: Contradiction recommendation with conflicting source verdicts. Egypt MoH marks BCG as contraindicated (severe combined immunodeficiency), WHO-DAK does not. Strictest-wins: any source==True triggers fail; rationale uses Egypt MoH per precedence ordering.

recommendations.reasoning: Two sources disagree on whether BCG is contraindicated for this clinical context.

source_verdicts.reason: Severe combined immunodeficiency — live attenuated BCG contraindicated.
